uk: 🕀 Усікновення чесної голови чесного і славного пророка, предтечі і хрестителя Івана
saints.en: Beheading of the Precious Head of the Honorable and Glorious Prophet, Forerunner and Baptist John

rubrics:
Вечірня (багряні ризи): «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» стихир – 8 Предтечі, Слава: Предтечі., І нині: богородичний-догмат 4-го гласу. Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання Предтечі: Іс. 40:1-3.9, 41:17-18, Малахії 3:1-7.12.22-24, Муд. 4:7.16-5:7. На Литії і стиховні – стихири Предтечі. На благословення хлібів: тропар Предтечі (2) і «Богородице Діво» (1). Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби Предтечі.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар Предтечі (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря Предтечі. Катизми чергові з сідальними Предтечі, також полієлей, величання і пополієлейний сідальний Предтечі. Степенна 4-го гласу, перший антифон. Прокімен і Єв. – Предтечі. Єв. Мт. 57 зач.; 14:1-13. Пс. 50, і стихира Предтечі. Канонів два – Предтечі. Катавасія чергова: «Хрест накреслив». По 3-ій пісні – сідальний Предтечі. По 6-ій – кондак-ікос Предтечі. По 9-ій – світильний Предтечі. На Хвалитних – 4 стихири Предтечі, Слава: Предтечі., І нині: богород. за гласом наславника. По великому славослов'ї з трисвятим – тропар Предтечі, Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря Предтечі. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби Предтечі.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак Предтечі.
Літургія: вся Служба – Предтечі. Ап. – Ді. 33 зач.; 13, 25-33. Єв. – Мр. 24 зач.; 6, 14-30.

troparion_en.text: The memory of the righteous is celebrated with hymns of praise, / but the Lord’s testimony is sufficient for you, O Forerunner. / You were shown in truth to be the most honorable of the prophets, / for you were deemed worthy to baptize in the streams of the Jordan Him whom they foretold. / Therefore, having suffered for the truth with joy, / you proclaimed to those in hell God who appeared in the flesh, / who takes away the sin of the world, / and grants us great mercy.

kontakion_en.text: The glorious beheading of the Forerunner, / became an act of divine dispensation, / for he preached to those in hell the coming of the Savior. / Let Herodias lament, for she entreated lawless murder, / loving not the law of God, nor eternal life, / but that which is false and temporal.

matched_oca_saint: The Beheading of the Holy Glorious Prophet, Forerunner, and Baptist John

oca_saints.name: The Beheading of the Holy Glorious Prophet, Forerunner, and Baptist John

troparion.text: The memory of the righteous is celebrated with hymns of praise, / but the Lord’s testimony is sufficient for you, O Forerunner. / You were shown in truth to be the most honorable of the prophets, / for you were deemed worthy to baptize in the streams of the Jordan Him whom they foretold. / Therefore, having suffered for the truth with joy, / you proclaimed to those in hell God who appeared in the flesh, / who takes away the sin of the world, / and grants us great mercy.

kontakion.text: The glorious beheading of the Forerunner, / became an act of divine dispensation, / for he preached to those in hell the coming of the Savior. / Let Herodias lament, for she entreated lawless murder, / loving not the law of God, nor eternal life, / but that which is false and temporal.

oca_saints.name: Saint Anastasius of the Strumitza Eparchy

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Anastasius, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Saint Arkadios the Wonderworker, Bishop of Arsinoe, Cyprus

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Arkadios, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Theodora and her daughter Theopiste

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy mothers Theodora and Theopiste, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
